hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE '(rm -rf /|rm -rf ~/|sudo rm|chmod 777|> /dev/sd|mkfs\.|dd if=)'; then echo '❌ Blocked: Dangerous command pattern detected' && exit 1; fi

if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE '(\.env$|\.env\.|credentials|secrets\.ya?ml|-prod\.ya?ml|\.pem$|\.key$|id_rsa|id_ed25519)'; then echo '⚠️ Attempting to read sensitive file - requires approval' && exit 1; fi

if [[ "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" == "git commit"* ]]; then echo '🔍 Scanning for secrets...' && SECRET_FOUND=0; STAGED=$(git diff --cached --name-only); for file in $STAGED; do if [ -f "$file" ] && ! echo "$file" | grep -qE '\.(md|txt|example|sample)$'; then if grep -qE 'AKIA[0-9A-Z]{16}' "$file" 2>/dev/null; then echo "❌ AWS key pattern in $file"; SECRET_FOUND=1; fi; if grep -qE 'sk-ant-[a-zA-Z0-9-]{20,}' "$file" 2>/dev/null; then echo "❌ Anthropic key pattern in $file"; SECRET_FOUND=1; fi; if grep -qE 'sk-[a-zA-Z0-9]{20,}' "$file" 2>/dev/null; then echo "❌ OpenAI key pattern in $file"; SECRET_FOUND=1; fi; if grep -qE 'ghp_[a-zA-Z0-9]{36}' "$file" 2>/dev/null; then echo "❌ GitHub token pattern in $file"; SECRET_FOUND=1; fi; if grep -qE 'xox[baprs]-[0-9a-zA-Z-]{10,}' "$file" 2>/dev/null; then echo "❌ Slack token pattern in $file"; SECRET_FOUND=1; fi; if grep -qE 'BEGIN (RSA |EC |DSA |OPENSSH )?PRIVATE KEY' "$file" 2>/dev/null; then echo "❌ Private key in $file"; SECRET_FOUND=1; fi; if grep -qE 'AccountKey=[a-zA-Z0-9+/=]{40,}' "$file" 2>/dev/null; then echo "❌ Azure storage key pattern in $file"; SECRET_FOUND=1; fi; if grep -qE '"type":\s*"service_account"' "$file" 2>/dev/null; then echo "❌ GCP service account JSON in $file"; SECRET_FOUND=1; fi; fi; done; if [ $SECRET_FOUND -eq 1 ]; then exit 1; fi; echo '✅ No secrets detected'; fi

if [[ "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" == "git commit"* ]]; then TEST_CMD=''; if [ -f pom.xml ]; then TEST_CMD='mvn test -q -DskipITs -Dmaven.test.failure.ignore=false'; elif [ -f build.gradle ] || [ -f build.gradle.kts ]; then TEST_CMD='./gradlew test -q'; elif [ -f package.json ] && grep -q '"test"' package.json 2>/dev/null; then TEST_CMD='npm test --silent 2>/dev/null'; elif [ -f pyproject.toml ] || [ -f setup.py ]; then TEST_CMD='pytest -q --tb=short 2>/dev/null'; elif [ -f go.mod ]; then TEST_CMD='go test ./... -short 2>/dev/null'; elif [ -f Cargo.toml ]; then TEST_CMD='cargo test --quiet 2>/dev/null'; fi; if [ -n "$TEST_CMD" ]; then echo '🧪 Running tests...'; eval "$TEST_CMD"; else echo '⚠️  No test framework detected'; fi; fi
if [[ "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" == "git commit"* ]]; then echo '✅ Committed:' && git log -1 --oneline; fi
